title: arabis glabra
intro: Arabis glabra, also known as rock cress or tower mustard, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant is rich in vitamins and minerals, offering health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting skin health. Arabis glabra can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
